# scm_forwarding_profile_source_application (Data Source)

ForwardingProfileSourceApplication data source

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a single forwarding profile source application by its ID.
data "scm_forwarding_profile_source_application" "example" {
  id = "12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012"
}

# Output the details of the forwarding profile source application.
output "forwarding_profile_source_application_result" {
  description = "The details of the specific forwarding profile source application read from the data source."
  value       = data.scm_forwarding_profile_source_application.example
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The id of the source application

### Optional

- `folder` (String) The folder in which the resource is defined
- `name` (String) The unique name identifying the source application. Must be alphanumeric with allowed characters [0-9a-zA-Z._-]

### Read-Only

- `applications` (List of String) List of application names to be included in this source application profile
- `description` (String) fowarding profile source application description
- `tfid` (String) The Terraform ID.
